era_context: Early Iron Age Levant and Eastern Mediterranean. The Kingdom of Israel and Judah are in the early post-division period. Phoenician city-states are consolidating maritime power. Mesopotamia is under the early Neo-Assyrian period. Egypt's 21st Dynasty is in decline.
disconfirming_evidence: No specific events are reliably attested to the year 982 BCE. The biblical chronology for this period is increasingly questioned by scholars who note anachronisms and theological motivations in the texts.
historiographic_note: The historical record for 982 BCE is negligible. No contemporary sources document events of this year. The period is known only through later compilations and archaeological inference. Year-by-year precision is not achievable for this era.
